top3.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    HAVING AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;

WITH TopTeams AS (
    SELECT team_api_id, AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS avg_speed
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY avg_speed DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
SELECT ta.buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN TopTeams tt ON ta.team_api_id = tt.team_api_id
ORDER BY ta.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;

final.sql:
WITH TopTeams AS (
    SELECT team_api_id, AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS avg_speed
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY avg_speed DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
SELECT ta.buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN TopTeams tt ON ta.team_api_id = tt.team_api_id
ORDER BY ta.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC;
